Implement the following plan:
# Plan: Resolve PR #7934 Review Thread
## Context
All code changes for PR #7934 are already committed and pushed. The only remaining action is to resolve review thread `PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5wH99s`.
## Remaining Action
Resolve thread `PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5wH99s` via `erk exec resolve-review-thread` with a reply explaining: - `is_header_at_legacy_position()` detection function added - Check 3 added to `erk pr check` for legacy header position
If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/schrockn/.claude/projects/-Users-schrockn--erk-repos-erk-worktrees-erk-slot-36/98898926-1df4-4210-a38b-dc09cbaa0bb3.jsonl
session.thinking:
The user wants me to resolve a review thread on PR #7934. I need to use `erk exec resolve-review-thread` with the thread ID `PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5wH99s` and a reply explaining the changes made.
Let me run the command.
session.tool_result:
Usage: erk exec resolve-review-thread [OPTIONS]
Resolve a PR review thread.
Takes a GraphQL node ID (from get-pr-review-comments output) and marks the thread as resolved. Optionally adds a reply comment first.
THREAD_ID: GraphQL node ID of the review thread
Options: --thread-id TEXT GraphQL node ID of the thread to resolve [required] --comment TEXT Optional comment to add before resolving -h, --help Show this message and exit.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: erk exec resolve-review-thread --thread-id "PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5wH99s" --comment "Addressed: a...[truncated 19 chars]... detection function and Check 3 to \`erk pr check\` for legacy header position detection."
Resolve PR review thread with explanation

session.assistant: Done. Resolved thread `PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5wH99s` with a comment explaining the two changes made: - `is_header_at_legacy_position()` detection function added - Check 3 added to `erk pr check` for legacy header position
